name: hcportal_editSong
description: Updates an existing HC.Song record. Caller must hold authIsSuperAdmin (AppAccessFlags & 0x40000000) or authCanManageSongs (AppAccessFlags & 0x00000040) for the kennel that originally added the song (Song.AddedBy_KennelId). Service accounts (callerType 1 or 2) are explicitly rejected — they may not edit songs. Fields not passed (or passed as empty strings) are stored as NULL, except Lyrics which is stored as '' (NOT NULL column).

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID used to look up the authenticated user and device secret. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: publicKennelId
parameters.description: Caller's kennel context for auth routing — passed as paramString to HC6.ValidatePortalAuth. Does not need to match the song's AddedBy_KennelId; the permission check uses AddedBy_KennelId directly.

parameters.name: songId
parameters.description: Required. The song to update. Returns error if NULL or if no non-removed song with this id exists.

parameters.name: songName
parameters.description: Required. Trimmed before update. Returns error if null or blank after trim.

parameters.name: tuneOf
parameters.description: Optional. Trimmed; stored as NULL if blank.

parameters.name: lyrics
parameters.description: Optional. Trimmed; stored as '' (empty string) if null because Song.Lyrics is NOT NULL.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional. Trimmed; stored as NULL if blank.

parameters.name: actions
parameters.description: Optional. Trimmed; stored as NULL if blank.

parameters.name: variants
parameters.description: Optional. Trimmed; stored as NULL if blank.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Optional. Trimmed; stored as NULL if blank.

parameters.name: bawdyRating
parameters.description: Required. Must be exactly 0, 1, 2, or 3. Returns error if null or out of range.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, permission, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error. Ordering: publicKennelId null → auth → songId null → songName blank → bawdyRating range → song not found → permission check.

rowsets.name: SuccessResult
rowsets.description: Returned after the song has been updated successfully.

sideEffects: UPDATE HC.Song SET SongName, TuneOf, BawdyRating, Notes, Actions, Variants, Lyrics, Tags, updatedAt WHERE id = @songId AND Removed = 0

permissionBits.note: Check is against the kennel identified by Song.AddedBy_KennelId, not @publicKennelId. Service accounts (callerType 1 or 2) are rejected before the permission check — they may not edit songs.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
